claim_boundary: Under protocol ESA-SER-DEBRIS-D206, the official ESA Space Situational Awareness Programme page supports the narrow claim that ESA maintains and publishes orbital debris tracking data and risk assessments.
source_rights_note: ESA official programme page. Public access.
runner_command: uv run claimbound run-root --protocol-id ESA-SER-DEBRIS-D206 --source-url https://www.esa.int/Space_Safety/Space_Situational_Awareness --operator NeoZorK
known_limitations: Source boundary limited to ESA SSA Programme official page
Does not evaluate tracking accuracy or completeness
Does not assess debris remediation capabilities
Card records debris tracking and risk assessment publication, not solution effectiveness
baseline_control_summary: Gate: Official ESA source page must explicitly name the mission/capability and confirm the narrow claim. Success means: (1) Source is accessible, (2) Source is from esa.int domain, (3) Relevant claim statement appears in source text, (4) No contradictions with claim boundary.
